title: Internet Speed Tester
description: A web application that allows users to test their internet speed. The application provides a simple interface where users can click a button to start the speed test. The app measures the download and upload speeds, as well as the ping time, and displays the results in an easy-to-understand format. Users can also view their speed test history and compare their results over time.
tech: Speed Test API (for measuring internet speed)
Local Storage or Backend Database (for storing speed test history)
